title: ActeOS source provenance batch (sources.yaml)
description: Certified legal sources and their immutable snapshots for one authoring batch. This file sits next to source_claims.yaml in a research/inbox batch directory and is loaded by authoring.loader.load_batch under the 'provenance' key. It backs content.sources and content.source_snapshots. The publish pipeline emits a content.source_claims row only when the claim's source_id resolves to a sources[].id here AND its snapshot_id resolves to a snapshots[].id here; otherwise the claim is deferred (FK-safe).

id.description: Stable source key referenced by claims' source_id and by snapshots' source_id, e.g. src.oug_97_2005.
Stable snapshot key referenced by claims' snapshot_id (this replaces the placeholder value 'pending').

source_id.description: Must match a sources[].id declared in this same file.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex sha256 of the captured bytes; NOT NULL in content.source_snapshots.
